title: Declarative Automation Bundles support for Lakebase database resources
body:
You can now define Lakebase database catalogs, instances, and synced tables in a bundle. This means you can deploy a full database environment with one command instead of setting up resources separately.

When you deploy a bundle with a database instance, the instance starts running immediately.

See [database\_catalog](/aws/en/dev-tools/bundles/resources#database_catalogs), [database\_instance](/aws/en/dev-tools/bundles/resources#database_instances), and [synced\_database\_table](/aws/en/dev-tools/bundles/resources#database_tables).
